title: Northstar Components vendor onboarding
request: Onboard Northstar Components as a new vendor for a $48,500 rush purchase. Validate risk, prepare approval, and create the procurement handoff.

agents.name: Intake Agent
agents.output: Request classified as rush vendor onboarding with purchase approval required.

agents.name: Vendor Data Agent
agents.output: Vendor record is incomplete. Three required onboarding artifacts are missing.

agents.name: Compliance Agent
agents.output: Purchase exceeds standard low-risk threshold and requires approval before vendor setup.

agents.name: Approval Summary Agent
agents.output: Drafted approval memo with amount, urgency, missing artifacts, and policy gate.

agents.name: Evidence Agent
agents.output: Compiled case timeline, risk flags, blocked actions, and approval requirements.

approval_queue.label: Approve vendor setup after missing artifacts are collected
approval_queue.reason: Vendor setup and purchase handoff are state-changing business actions.
